special_mechanics.name: Ship Maneuverability
special_mechanics.description: The ship features exemplary maneuverability as a scrolling shooter protagonist. Movement is constrained to 2D plane navigation.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Pickups
special_mechanics.description: Various supercharged weapons can be collected during gameplay to enhance ship firepower.

tier_notes: T2 - Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Super R-Type is a scrolling shooter, not a platformer. Available sources contain gameplay descriptions and reception commentary but no quantified physics parameters. Ship maneuverability described as 'exemplary' by contemporary reviewers. No sub-pixel system, gravity, or jump mechanics documented as game is arcade-style shmup with horizontal ship movement.
